name: Diet Blueberry Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, cornstarch, diet sweetener, and orange rind in a bowl, pressing out all lumps.
2. Place the blueberries in a 6-cup shallow casserole that has been lightly sprayed with non-stick vegetable cooking spray.
3. Pour the sugar mixture into the casserole with the blueberries, add lemon juice, and toss well to mix.
4. Using a potato masher, lightly mash the blueberries. Set aside.
5. Butter one side of the bread slices. Stack them and cut into 1/2-inch cubes.
6. Add the bread cubes to the casserole and toss well to mix.
7. Bake the pudding at 350°F for 30 minutes. Remove from the oven, add the evaporated milk, and stir well to mix.
8. Return the pudding to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes more, uncovered.
9. Serve warm, topped with a little whole milk if desired. Makes 6 servings.
